name: GALLERIE II Countess of Orange Halloween Owl
description: Create a new autumn tradition with the Countess of Orange Owl. This imposing yet festive countess is dressed in her Halloween best, ready for the midnight masquerade ball and to become a centerpiece of your fall display. Just be sure that her carriage doesn't turn into a jack-o'-lantern at midnight! Crafted of polyester, polyresin and plastic the Countess of Orange Owl stands 18-inches high x 8-inches wide x 4-inches deep. Care: Wipe clean. Imported.
